item.title: Better things are possible!
item.description:
This is what happens when you put socialists in charge people!
It is not a coincidence that the socialist is doing things for his city that the liberals would have told you were impossible or not worth it. When you put capitalists in charge, they serve the capitalist class. When you put socialists in charge THEY SERVE SOCIETY

item.title: Lil dump for your sunday <3 check your wifi :)
item.description:
Here I go again
Nature is beautiful
Poor birb
Now thats a good prank <3
The biscuit bakery never sleeps
I wonder how long he had been hanging there
Nani
Catfish level 0
This cat is gonna have this guy pee in a bottle
Say what you will about Imgur, but I'm glad there is no algorithm here
Dream big!
You hear that? Take it to heart <3 And with that I say goodbye, enjoy the rest of your Sunday And drink your water :)

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1738 (Green Sunday Special)
item.description:
I have curated some of my favorite reflecting pool memes for today's special edition. Let's get this bread.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [Kissing noises] "Morning! Thank you. Fuck you. What the fuck? What doin?" ____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin

item.title: GovBrief Today #520
item.description: A Black woman rode the DC Metro alone on the Fourth of July, surrounded by masked men on their way to march for a white America. Patriot Front brought about 400 members and their Confederate flags to the capital's 250th birthday. None were arrested, and they were gone before lunch. But a photographer caught that train car, one woman seated among men who believe her race makes her inferior. Where do you go on a moving train? The men who founded this country signed their names to a public document announcing treason and dared King George to oppose them. These men hid their faces and waved the flag of an armed insurrection against the United States that killed more than 360,000 of our soldiers. Their cowardice is now part of the official record of the celebration of America's 250th anniversary. I've emailed 8,093 stories over 520 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260704-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/patriot-front [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-july4 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/iowa-beaches [4] https://go.govbrief.today/smith-report-leaked [5] https://go.govbrief.today/doj-adani [6] https://go.govbrief.today/carroll-payment [7] https://go.govbrief.today/pelosi-crash [8] https://go.govbrief.today/america-250 [9] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-ring [10] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-investor-losses [11] https://go.govbrief.today/demolition-reuse-tacoma Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Actor Jonathan Banks (Breaking Bad, Better Call Saul) Slams Trump without even saying his name
item.description:
Released over the July 4th weekend, the video coincided with Trump's official "Freedom 250" address on the National Mall. Dozens of Hollywood figures participated in a joint reading of Timothy Snyder's book "On Tyranny", using its lessons to issue a grim warning against Trump's political rhetoric. More info: https://www.wrbl.com/news/national /celebrities-counter-trumps-america-250 -rhetoric-with-on-tyranny-reading/ https://youtube.com/@celebsagainsttrump
Independence Day celebrates the publishing of the Declaration of Independence. It lists the acts of tyranny that justify the Declaration. I consider really reeeeeally reading them a minimum requirement of this celebration. They are so similar to what Trump is doing that social media posts listing them have been attacked by MAGA onmine thinking that they were about Trump. Anyone who does not stand by them by definition cannot be a patriot or claim to be proud to be American. The paragraph immediately after them is also particularly powerful. Please... check it out! https://www.archives.gov/founding-docs/declaration-transcript
item.dc:creator: ChewyTheWookie

item.dc:creator: DrForester

item.title: Alt for Norge!
item.description: Never really cared about football at all before, but when Norway qualifies for the first time in 28 years it's a bit more exciting, especially for how far we have gone, and the united support for the team bringing everyone together. Hearing the "Ro!" Chant echoing throughout the stadium stirs my heart a bit. With the win over Brazil we are going to the quarter finals. Haaland is an absolute fiend on the field, some of his goals are like he somehow magics the ball into the net, it shouldn't be possible. My brother's GF is Brazilian, I wonder how it is at home right now.

item.description: Cutting Medicaid and the ACA will cause the deaths of 51,000 Americans for lack of being able to see a doctor because they have no insurance or money for doctor's bills.
item.dc:creator: t1mac

item.title: 29 weeks without any selfharm
item.description: My only red jersey, so had to wear it today obviously to cheer on Haaland and the rest of the Norwegian team playing against Brazil today. Been rough ass weeks. Been so close to fucking up its not even funny. Some days i fear it will be like this forever; having to really fight the urges. Having selfharm as a default- setting every time life gets a bit hard. I am just so drained after these past weeks, i am barely able to even feel proud that i remain clean. But i hope some day again i will feel the pride, feel that it is truly worth the fights. Feel joy in my healing arms. Thanks for everyone checking in
item.dc:creator: dotnote

item.title: Sliding into those DMs
item.description: i've had grey hairs since i was 12
item.dc:creator: PixelSprite64

item.title: It's my cake day! Have some memes and let me tell you about my coming book (please)
item.description:
11 years. Huh. Well then
This movie hit me so hard the first time I watched it. It has every time since, but also the first time too.
Okay but the sexual tension between Villanelle and Eve is off the charts
Me whenever I see an @Alsoashley post. She's so pretty
In my case it was being born
Yeah that's how that went for me
Hi! Y'all seem to have like when I talked about my books in the past. So I have a new one coming soon. Except this will be the first time I am crowdfunding it. Project Tasman is a sapphic psychological dystopian novel that focuses on a woman, Alana Quevedo, who gets stuck in a government experiment against her will. While in there, she has to choose who lives and who dies. She's stuck with her fiancee, her ex, her brother, her sister, and a total stranger. But everyone either had a dark past or another complicating reason that might make Alana consider killing them.
As for me, I'm S. Morgan Burbank (they/them/she). I am a trans femme author who primarily writes dystopia and sci-fi, though I have also done dedicated trans fiction. Sorry for the selfie. But I'm not sorry for my kickass sword earrings.
Anyway. Want to help? It's super easy, barely an inconvenience. Crowdfunding for Project Tasman will run August 3-September 4th. Until then, please consider following the project on BackerKit for updates on when it goes live https://www.backerkit.com/c/projects/s-morgan-burbank/project-tasman-a-sapphic-dystopian-novel Imgur has always been crazy supportive of me. I just wanted to thank you all for that. It's been a fun 11 years
Ragnarok tax
